metadata.title: White House crafting executive order to thwart state AI laws
metadata.description: The draft surfaced after President Donald Trump called for a single federal standard on AI "instead of a patchwork of 50 State Regulatory Regimes."
metadata.author: Emily Wilkins,Mary Catherine Wellons
metadata.keywords: Legislation,Pam Bondi,Politics,Breaking News: Politics,Elon Musk,Sam Altman,Donald Trump,Donald J. Trump,business news
